mental_emotional.text: Lack of concentration; impossible to study; despondent; desire to be with people. Irritable. Felt mean towards everyone

head.text: Frontal headache, worse over left eye, in the evening, better by short sleep

generalities.text: [Gastric] Tongue coated, foul taste. Salty taste to all cereals. Belching. Appetite increased. Light, yellow, narrow, very offensive stool. Intestinal dyspepsia

sleep.text: Increased desire to sleep; wakes unrefreshed, half doped feeling

keynotes.text: color="#800000">SKATOLUM (SKATOL) Represents the ultimate end of proteid decomposition and is a constituent of human feces. Acne with auto-intoxication dependent upon intestinal decomposition. Stomach and abdominal symptoms and frontal headache. Sluggishness with no ambition. Desire to curse and swear.
